_meta.description: IN$DEX onboarding copy — the text shown on each screen of the 3-step flow
_meta.note: Only edit values under 'copy'. Do not change JSON keys or structure.

step1.headline: Join IN$DEX. Free. Instant. No bank needed.
step1.subheading: Get a free wallet and Web3 domain in under 60 seconds.
step1.trust_line: No ID required. No forms. Free forever.
step1.helper_text: Already have an account? Sign in here.

step2.headline: Claim your IN$DEX name
step2.subheading: This is your wallet address. Anyone can send you money using this name.
step2.availability_taken: That name is taken. Try another.
step2.otp_subheading: We sent a 6-digit code to your number.
step2.otp_resend: Didn't get the code? Resend it.
step2.trust_line: Your name is yours forever. No one can take it.

step3.headline: Welcome to IN$DEX, {name}.
step3.subheading: Your wallet is live. Your domain is {domain}.IN$DEX
step3.confirmation_ready: You can now receive and send payments — instantly.

errors.otp_wrong: That code isn't right. Please try again.
errors.otp_expired: Your code expired. Request a new one.
errors.name_too_short: Your name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.network_error: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
errors.session_expired: Your session ended. Start again — it only takes 60 seconds.
